SEARCH
Package com.govsim.govsim.model

Class City

java.lang.Object
com.govsim.govsim.model.City
public class City extends Object
Represents the current state of the simulated city. Holds budget, satisfaction, population, month, and year.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private double
    budget
    The city treasury in euros.
    private int
    month
    Current simulation month (1-12).
    private double
    monthlyExpenses
    Fixed monthly expenses deducted from the budget each month.
    private double
    monthlyIncome
    Fixed monthly income added to the budget each month.
    private int
    population
    Total population of the city.
    private double
    satisfaction
    Citizen satisfaction level (0.0 - 100.0).
    private int
    year
    Current simulation year (starts at 1).

    Description

  • Field Details

    • budget

      private double budget
      The city treasury in euros.

    • satisfaction

      private double satisfaction
      Citizen satisfaction level (0.0 - 100.0).

    • month

      private int month
      Current simulation month (1-12).

    • year

      private int year
      Current simulation year (starts at 1).

    • monthlyIncome

      private double monthlyIncome
      Fixed monthly income added to the budget each month.

    • monthlyExpenses

      private double monthlyExpenses
      Fixed monthly expenses deducted from the budget each month.

    • population

      private int population
      Total population of the city.

  • Constructor Details

    • City

      public City(double budget)
      Creates a new City with the given starting budget.
      Parameters:
      budget - the initial budget in euros

  • Method Details

    • getBudget

      public double getBudget()
      Returns the current city budget.
      Returns:
      budget in euros

    • getSatisfaction

      public double getSatisfaction()
      Returns citizen satisfaction level.
      Returns:
      satisfaction (0.0 - 100.0)

    • getMonth

      public int getMonth()
      Returns the current simulation month.
      Returns:
      month (1-12)

    • getYear

      public int getYear()
      Returns the current simulation year.
      Returns:
      year starting from 1

    • getPopulation

      public int getPopulation()
      Returns the city population.
      Returns:
      population count

    • applyMonthlyFinance

      public void applyMonthlyFinance()
      Applies monthly income and expenses to the budget. Net change = +30,000 by default.

    • setBudget

      public void setBudget(double budget)
      Sets the city budget.
      Parameters:
      budget - new budget in euros

    • setSatisfaction

      public void setSatisfaction(double satisfaction)
      Sets the citizen satisfaction level.
      Parameters:
      satisfaction - value between 0.0 and 100.0

    • nextMonth

      public void nextMonth()
      Advances the simulation by one month. Resets month to 1 and increments year after month 12.

    • setPopulation

      public void setPopulation(int p)
      Sets the city population.
      Parameters:
      p - new population count

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
